expectedAnswers: No problem! Have a great day!
Totally understand — enjoy your time with your sister!
Bye for now! Hope you have an amazing day!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否自然接受对方离开并表达祝福
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否符合母语者日常道别习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'have a...', 'enjoy', 'great/awesome' 等祝福词汇

expectedAnswers: Same here! Let's plan to meet up again soon!
I really enjoyed it too — take care and stay in touch!
Definitely! We should do this more often. Have a wonderful week!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应情感并表达未来联系意愿
语言准确性：是否正确使用 'same here', 'take care', 'stay in touch' 等表达
表达自然度：是否避免机械重复，有情感递进
关键词覆盖：是否包含 'enjoyed', 'plan to meet', 'stay in touch' 等社交关键词
